title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.332 - Property, corporation may purchase and control access
text:
238.332.  Property, corporation may purchase and control access. — The corporation may, subject to commission approval:
  (1)  Purchase land or receive contributions of land and cash for project right-of-way;
  (2)  Limit and control access from adjacent property to a corporation project; and
  (3)  Sell and convey excess right-of-way for fair market value to any person or entity.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 23) 
Effective 5-30-90
